title: rhododendron periclymenoides
intro: Rhododendron periclymenoides, also known as the pink azalea or Pinxterbloom, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as colds and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Rhododendron periclymenoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
